description: Generate a LabArchives config.yaml (regional api_url + institutional and user credentials) from environment variables. Writes the file under record_store with 0600 permissions. Local only — never contacts the network.
rules: credentials come from env vars (LA_*), never hard-coded
config.yaml is written under RECORD_STORE with 0600 permissions
needs the PyYAML package (import yaml); degrades to {} if absent
usage: Set LA_API_URL, LA_ACCESS_KEY_ID, LA_ACCESS_PASSWORD, LA_USER_EMAIL, LA_USER_EXTERNAL_PASSWORD. Output: config.yaml + setup_config.json audit.
limitation: Does not validate credentials against the live API (that requires the labarchives-py package and network). LA_API_URL should be a regional endpoint: https://api.labarchives.com/api (US), https://auapi.labarchives.com/api (AU), or https://ukapi.labarchives.com/api (UK).
